params.description: Data table displays student-collected block counts. Red blocks, Blue blocks, Green blocks, Yellow blocks. Values are multiples of 5 between 10 and 45.
Vertical bar graph appears with Scale Preview System visible. Four scale buttons available: Scale of 1, Scale of 2, Scale of 5, Scale of 10.

beats.text: You just saw that all four scales worked for your data. Nice to have options!

elements.description: Data table showing student block counts for Red blocks, Blue blocks, Green blocks, Yellow blocks.
Vertical bar graph in reading mode with Scale Preview System visible showing four scale button options.

beats.text: But what if the numbers are bigger? Or what if you need to figure out which scale is BEST?

elements.description: Data table showing student block counts.
Vertical bar graph with Scale Preview System visible.

beats.text: Let's learn how to figure out which scale to choose and what tells us that a scale won't work for the data we have.

elements.description: Data table showing student block counts.
Vertical bar graph with Scale Preview System visible.
